judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "4, ['Premium Insurance Membership offering a global policy discount and dedicated advisor — not covered by any template field', 'Wellness Programs as a standalone paid service — no field for separate wellness subscription cost', '4-star quality rating for property coverage — numeric or descriptive star rating not supported', 'Explicit percentage discount (15% global policy discount) — no field for percentage-based discount or promotional membership']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "14, ['HealthFirst Standard Plan (Physical) with telemedicine, gym reimbursement, preventive care, chronic condition management', 'HealthFirst Standard Plan (Mental) with family therapy, stress and anxiety management, psychiatry, wellness programs', 'Property/Home Coverage including liability, temporary accommodation, electronics coverage', 'Travel Coverage with global executive and family protection, medical evacuation', 'Adventure Travel Add-on covering sports and volunteer travel', 'Family coverage including adult children and young adults', 'Executive-level package classification (coverage_tier = executive)', 'Global coverage (global_coverage = yes)', '24/7 support (emergency_support = 24/7)', 'Telemedicine included (telemedicine_included = yes)', 'Wellness programs included in health plan (wellness_programs_included = yes)', 'Priority claims and dedicated advisor (service_features)', 'Cost and savings analysis (cost_analysis fields for monthly, annual, and savings)', 'Confirmation request to proceed with digital enrollment (confirmation_status and documentation_status fields)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 4, ['Premium Insurance Membership offering a global policy discount and dedicated advisor — not covered by any template field', 'Wellness Programs as a standalone paid service — no field for separate wellness subscription cost', '4-star quality rating for property coverage — numeric or descriptive star rating not supported', 'Explicit percentage discount (15% global policy discount) — no field for percentage-based discount or promotional membership']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 14, ['HealthFirst Standard Plan (Physical) with telemedicine, gym reimbursement, preventive care, chronic condition management', 'HealthFirst Standard Plan (Mental) with family therapy, stress and anxiety management, psychiatry, wellness programs', 'Property/Home Coverage including liability, temporary accommodation, electronics coverage', 'Travel Coverage with global executive and family protection, medical evacuation', 'Adventure Travel Add-on covering sports and volunteer travel', 'Family coverage including adult children and young adults', 'Executive-level package classification (coverage_tier = executive)', 'Global coverage (global_coverage = yes)', '24/7 support (emergency_support = 24/7)', 'Telemedicine included (telemedicine_included = yes)', 'Wellness programs included in health plan (wellness_programs_included = yes)', 'Priority claims and dedicated advisor (service_features)', 'Cost and savings analysis (cost_analysis fields for monthly, annual, and savings)', 'Confirmation request to proceed with digital enrollment (confirmation_status and documentation_status fields)']
